title: archivist: aggregate historical ledgers natively in index generator 🗃️
summary: Updated `build_index.py` to aggregate run history natively from existing ledgers (`.jules/docs/ledger.json` and `.jules/quality/ledger.json`) in addition to `.jules/runs/`. This consolidates metrics without altering or erasing source-of-truth ledgers.
proof_summary: Generated `RUNS_ROLLUP.md` correctly shows standard packets alongside docs and quality runs.
